# `src/env/generated`

**AUTO-GENERATED. Do not hand-edit.**

| Source | Reproduces |
|---|---|
| `specs/typespec/env/main.tsp` | env_bindings.rs: every enum and model declared in the OpenboxEnv namespace, plus the ENVIRONMENTS URL registry from specs/environments.json |
